function.name: list_notion_pages
function.description: Lists all Notion pages with their titles and public visibility status.

function.name: create_notion_page
function.description: Creates a new top-level Notion page in the workspace. Optionally seeds it with plain-text content split into paragraph blocks.

title.description: The title of the new page.

content.description: Optional plain-text content to seed the page with. Each non-empty line becomes a paragraph block.

function.name: get_notion_page_content
function.description: Retrieves the content of a Notion page as readable text. Supports filtering by content type: all blocks, headings only, or todos only.

page_id.description: The ID of the Notion page to retrieve content from.

filter.description: Content filter. 'all' returns the full page, 'headings' returns h1-h3 headings only, 'todos' returns all to-do items only. Defaults to 'all'.

function.name: replace_notion_block
function.description: Finds a block on a Notion page by its exact current text and replaces it with new text. Use get_notion_page_content first to read the exact text of the block you want to change.

page_id.description: The ID of the Notion page containing the block to update.

old_text.description: The exact current text of the block to replace.

new_text.description: The new text to replace it with.

function.name: write_notion_page_content
function.description: Writes content to an existing Notion page. Use 'append' to add to the bottom of the page, or 'replace' to wipe the page and rewrite it entirely.

page_id.description: The ID of the Notion page to write to. Use list_notion_pages to find valid IDs.

content.description: Plain-text content to write. Each non-empty line becomes a paragraph block.

mode.description: 'append' adds content to the bottom of the page. 'replace' clears the page first then writes the new content. Defaults to 'append'.
